name: result-with-artifacts
description: Long agent prose followed by a write_file artifact, with NO astonish-report fence — verifies the negative path: agent text renders normally and the artifact appears as a compact ArtifactCard (NOT embedded inline as a report). The inline-report gate requires an astonish-report fence + matching report_marker event; this fixture has neither, so the artifact stays a download card. Renaming this fixture is intentional: pre-change the same shape used to trigger inline embedding, and now exercises the regression boundary.

data.text: Here is the comprehensive analysis of the market research data. The findings indicate several key trends across the technology sector that are worth examining in detail. First, cloud computing adoption continues to accelerate with enterprise spending projected to increase by 22% year over year. Second, artificial intelligence integration into existing workflows has become a top priority for 78% of surveyed organizations. Third, cybersecurity investments are reaching record levels as threat landscapes evolve and regulatory requirements tighten. The data also reveals significant regional variations, with North American markets leading adoption while Asia-Pacific regions show the fastest growth rates. Supply chain digitization emerged as a critical theme, with 65% of respondents planning major technology investments in logistics and procurement systems. Remote work infrastructure spending remains elevated despite return-to-office trends, suggesting a permanent shift in workplace technology requirements. In conclusion, the market shows strong growth potential across all segments examined in this research.
